title: Django user account login by email (no usernames)
snippet: A common gripe with the Django framework is how it handles user accounts. Or, rather, how difficult it is to change from its default User model to something else.Django’s default system uses username-based logins, but a lot of developers are looking to use email-based logins, which have become co...
